name: World of Alice   Moon Jump
description: World of Alice - Moon Jump World of Alice - Moon Jump is an educational game developed for children where you will train your reflexes by jumping over lunar monsters in a space adventure in a fun way from your cell phone, tablet or computer. Excellent educational resource. In World of Alice, learning is fun.
instructions: Jump over the moon monsters and collect the most stars
